description: Behavioral test prompts for the per-project review-learnings skill. These are realistic invocations a developer would actually type; the expected_output describes the correct behavior (mode selection, why-capture, polarity, user confirmation) rather than a byte-exact artifact, because most paths are interactive and write a user-confirmed file. No output-contract harness key is set, so CI auto-discovery skips these; they are for manual and skill-creator evaluation.

evals.name: capture-false-positive-with-why
evals.prompt: 방금 impl-review 가 src/setup/test-bootstrap.ts 의 top-level await 를 'missing await bug' 로 지적했는데 이건 false positive 야. 우리 test runner 는 setup 파일에서 top-level await 를 지원하거든. 이거 학습해둬.
evals.expected_output: Enters update mode, --source feedback. Classifies polarity as FALSE-POSITIVE. Captures the user's stated reason ('runner supports top-level await in setup') verbatim as the Why. Generalizes scope from the single file to a glob like **/*.test.ts or setup files. Presents an ADD CHANGESET for confirmation BEFORE writing docs/review-learnings.md, then prints a 'Learnings added' confirmation.

evals.name: read-applicable-before-review
evals.prompt: 이번 PR 은 db/queries/ 아래 SQL 파일들만 바꿨어. 리뷰 전에 이 경로에 적용되는 review learnings 를 불러와줘.
evals.expected_output: Enters read mode with --target db/queries/**. Reads docs/review-learnings.md (or reports it is absent without blocking). Emits a compact 'Applicable Review Learnings' block containing only learnings whose Scope matches the SQL paths, each line showing rule + why + polarity. Does not load unrelated (e.g. TS-only) learnings.

evals.name: deprecate-contradictory-learning
evals.prompt: review-learnings 에 N+1 관련 규칙이 두 개 있는 것 같아. 하나는 src/api/users.ts 한정이고 하나는 src/api/** 전체인데, 좁은 쪽은 이제 필요없어. 정리해줘.
evals.expected_output: Enters curate mode. Reads the file, identifies the narrow (users.ts) and broad (src/api/**) learnings as a contradictory/superseded pair. Proposes a DEPRECATE for the narrow one with a 'superseded-by' pointer to the broad one, marks it ~~strikethrough~~ rather than hard-deleting, and asks for confirmation. Updates the change log and the updated-date header.

evals.name: harvest-pr-bot-comments
evals.prompt: PR #128 에 CodeRabbit 코멘트가 여러 개 달렸는데, 우리가 받아들인 것들은 다음 리뷰부터 미리 잡도록 학습으로 남기고 싶어.
evals.expected_output: Enters update mode, --source pr --pr 128. Uses gh to fetch line-anchored review-bot comments. Classifies only resolved/accepted comments as DO learnings and explicitly-dismissed ones as FALSE-POSITIVE (with the dismissal reason); skips open/unreacted comments. Generalizes each line-specific comment to its class and scope, then presents a CHANGESET for confirmation before writing.
